title: Miravi, by KNoWS, IDLab, Ghent University -- imec
introductionText: Make your choice in the menu on the left.

queries.name: Tel alle triples in de dataset
queries.description: Een dummy usecase-specifieke query die eenvoudig alle triples in de dataset telt.
queries.comment: Een comunicaContext die de bron specificeert, wordt automatisch toegevoegd.

queries.name: Geslacht per organisatietype
queries.description: Groepeert personen op geslacht en organisatietype.

queries.name: Organisaties
queries.description: Lijst organisaties uit de dataset op.

queries.name: Organisaties gefilterd op type
queries.description: Lijst organisaties op, gefilterd op organisatietype.

queries.name: Personen
queries.description: Lijst personen uit de dataset op.

queries.name: Missing classes
queries.description: Listing classes that are not defined in the initial SHACL nor in the _customVoc sheet, i.e., classes containing 'http://missing.example.com/'.

queries.name: Missing properties
queries.description: Listing properties that are not defined in the initial SHACL nor in the _customVoc sheet, i.e., properties containing 'http://missing.example.com/', with the class of their domain.
